channel.title: Dev Guide — AI-Powered Developer Intelligence
channel.description: In-depth technical guides on developer tooling, AI code editors, cloud platforms, and engineering workflows — updated daily.

item.title: Railway vs Vercel vs Netlify: which platform for full-stack apps

item.title: Versioning Developer Documentation in Static Site Hosts
item.description: A technical guide to implementing version-controlled documentation workflows for static site hosts using URL routing and build automation.
